name: bouncer
description: A one-file door-guard for AI coding agents. Bounces destructive shell commands before they run. Name's not on the list.

plugins.name: bouncer
plugins.description: Blocks rm -rf, DROP TABLE, curl|sh, force-push, and device wipes via a fail-closed preToolUse hook. 45/45 footguns blocked, 0 false positives.
